patches_modified.name: Free in-app purchases
patches_modified.description: Skips Google Play Billing and credits IAP items (tribes, skins, crystal packs) directly. Patches the billing bridge to report success, forces Purchase.isAcknowledged() and getPurchaseState() to return valid values, and intercepts launchBillingFlow to create a fake Purchase via Java extension and feed it to the game's native billing callback — no payment, no Play Store dialog, instant credit.

patches_added.name: Capture tab host for programmatic tab switching
patches_added.description: Lets extension Activities (Tools/About) trigger a real MX Player tab switch instead of just finishing back to whatever tab was last visible.

patches_modified.name: Cobalt downloads
patches_modified.description: Replaces YouTube's download action and Downloads page with a native cobalt manager.

patches_added.name: Modo Fantasma
patches_added.description: No recibes ni envias mensajes mientras este activo.

patches_removed.name: DND Mode
patches_removed.description: No marca mensajes como leídos al abrir chats.

patches_removed.name: Descargar estados
patches_removed.description: Guarda estados de foto y video directamente.

patches_modified.name: Freeze Last Seen
patches_modified.description: Congela la hora de ultima conexion.
